calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-26-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: duplicate entry.

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-26-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, CSR: Mitch Lyon.
Petitioner Nancy Diaz, present, in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of names were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to Liyahnise Gianna Diaz.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-28-2005 Reset To May-26-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Joyce Long.
Petitioner: Nancy Diaz, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Liyahnise Gianna Tulali, was sworn and examined.
Pending hearing of FPT 04-375379 on Feb. 28, 2005 in Dept. 404, this matter is continued to May 26, 2005 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218, Petitioner to send notice of the new hearing date to Minor's father, service by mail or in person, and file proof of service with the court.
